tracks.meaning: a category or classification of data in a programming language or system that determines what values a variable can hold and what operations can be performed on it
a particular design or style of typeface or font used for displaying text
a group of organisms sharing a common characteristic or classification within a taxonomic system
to write or produce text using a typewriter or keyboard
a category or classification of product, service, or business model
a classification system for categorizing personality traits or behavioral patterns, as in personality typing
a classification of a disease or medical condition into subtypes based on characteristics like blood type or cancer stage
a person of a particular kind or character, often used to describe someone's personality or social category
to enter text or data into a computer or electronic device using a keyboard
a category or classification of legal offense, crime, or legal document
the representation of a letter, numeral, or symbol produced through mechanical or electronic means
